Meta.homeTitle: Daron Namibia | Marine, oil & gas, logistics — Walvis Bay
Meta.homeDescription: Daron Namibia — ship chandlery, offshore catering, logistics and dry-dock support from Walvis Bay. Compliant, dependable supply for Africa's seas and shores.
Meta.aboutDescription: Founded in 2012, Daron Namibia has grown from a ship chandler into a full-service partner for marine, oil & gas, hospitality, mining, and industrial sectors.
Meta.servicesDescription: Ship chandlery, offshore catering, warehousing, health & safety, and dry-dock technical support in Walvis Bay — all through one dependable partner.
Meta.dryDockDescription: Dry-dock and technical support in Walvis Bay: marine repairs, structural fabrication, mechanical/electrical services, safety, and ship chandling.
Meta.industriesDescription: Tailored provisioning and technical support for marine, offshore, oil and gas, hospitality, mining and industrial sectors across Southern Africa.
Meta.oilGasTitle: Oil & Gas — Proven in Offshore Drilling
Meta.oilGasDescription: Offshore oil and gas supply in Walvis Bay — concurrent rig support with proven track record across Deepsea Mira, Bollsta, Hercules and Transocean.
Meta.whyDaronDescription: Why operators across Africa pick Daron Namibia: quotes in hours not days, deep inventory, 24/7 operational reality, and an AI-powered RFQ desk.
Meta.insightsDescription: Articles and updates from Daron Namibia: case studies, market commentary, and the operating reality of marine, oil & gas, and logistics in southern Africa.
Meta.aiTitle: Meet Don — Daron's AI operations copilot
Meta.aiDescription: Meet Don — Daron Namibia's AI operations copilot. Reads RFQs, drafts quotes, available on WhatsApp 24/7. Powered by Anthropic Claude on OpenClaw.
Meta.contactDescription: Get in touch with Daron Namibia in Walvis Bay. WhatsApp the Daron AI assistant for an instant quote, or message our ops team for tailored support.
Meta.privacyDescription: How Daron Namibia collects, uses and protects your personal data — including chat widget data, RFQ intake and website analytics. Updated April 2026.

Privacy.heroIntro: Daron Trading Namibia (Pty) Ltd takes the privacy of visitors, clients and suppliers seriously. This page explains what data we collect, why, and the rights you have over it.
Privacy.sec1Body: This website is operated by Daron Trading Namibia (Pty) Ltd, a Namibian private company with its principal office at No. 31 Grand Avenue, Industrial Area, Walvis Bay, Erongo Region, Namibia. For any privacy matter you can reach us at the contact details in section 6.
Privacy.sec2Body: We only collect what we need to respond to your enquiry or operate the website. Specifically:
Privacy.sec2Item1: Chat widget: name, email, company (optional), vessel name (optional), WhatsApp number (optional), the messages you send, and the IP address and browser your request came from.
Privacy.sec2Item2: Contact forms and email enquiries: whatever details you choose to include.
Privacy.sec2Item3: Standard server logs: IP address, referring URL, user agent, and timestamps — retained briefly for security and debugging.
Privacy.sec2Item4: We do not use advertising trackers, and we do not sell your data to anyone.
Privacy.sec3Body: The data is used only for legitimate business purposes:
Privacy.sec3Item1: Responding to your enquiry, drafting quotes, and routing your request to the right Daron team member.
Privacy.sec3Item2: Operating, securing, and improving the website (including abuse prevention and error monitoring).
Privacy.sec3Item3: Meeting our obligations under Namibian law and, where applicable, the laws of your own jurisdiction.
Privacy.sec4Heading: 4. Who processes your data on our behalf
Privacy.sec4Body: Messages sent to our AI assistant (Don) are processed by Anthropic (Claude) under their enterprise terms — they do not train on your data. Lead notifications may be forwarded to our own Slack or equivalent team channel. Website hosting and analytics are handled by Vercel (EU/US regions). All sub-processors are bound by confidentiality and data-protection obligations.
Privacy.sec5Body: Depending on where you are based, you may have the right to:
Privacy.sec5Item1: Access the personal data we hold about you.
Privacy.sec5Item2: Correct inaccurate data or complete incomplete data.
Privacy.sec5Item3: Request deletion of your data, subject to any legal or contractual obligation requiring us to retain it.
Privacy.sec5Item4: Withdraw consent at any time for processing that relies on consent (for example, by not using the chat widget).
Privacy.sec6Body: Questions, access requests, or concerns about how we handle your data can be directed to
Privacy.siteNote: This policy applies to {siteName} ({url}) and the chat widget embedded within it. It may be updated from time to time; material changes will be highlighted at the top of this page.

Home.heroHeading: When your rig or vessel can't wait, we don't either.
Home.heroIntro: Daron Namibia since 2012. Quotes in hours, stock on deck, crew on call around the clock — backed by the Daron Group's network of 2,500+ suppliers across Africa and Europe.
Home.asideBullet1: Three drilling rigs concurrent, all supplied — Mira, Bollsta, Hercules, Transocean.
Home.asideBullet2: Quotes in hours, not days — AI-backed RFQ desk, 51-person ops team.
Home.asideBullet3: 24/7 on WhatsApp and phone — rigs don't pause, we don't either.
Home.asideBullet4: Our trucks, our drivers, our warehouse — no third-party handoffs.
Home.asideBullet5: 2,500+ suppliers across Africa and Europe — if we don't stock it, we source it.
Home.asideBullet6: ISO 9001 + HACCP + IMPA/ISSA — audit-ready on every provisioning.
Home.storyHeading: From Walvis Bay to the world: your one-stop supply partner
Home.storyBox: Founded in {founded} in Walvis Bay, Daron Namibia has grown from a dedicated ship chandler into a full-service provider supporting the marine, oil & gas, hospitality, mining, and industrial sectors.
Home.storyBody: We streamline procurement, logistics, and catering through our in-house infrastructure and expert teams, so you can focus on your operations while we take care of the rest.
Home.vpHeading: Five reasons operators across Africa work with us
Home.vp1Title: Everything you need, one trusted partner
Home.vp1Body: Procurement, logistics, catering, staffing, technical supplies — all managed through one dependable provider.
Home.vp2Body: Modern warehousing with refrigerated, frozen, and dry storage ensures consistent quality and supply.
Home.vp3Body: ISO 9001:2015, HACCP compliance, ISSA & IMPA listings guarantee international credibility.
Home.vp4Body: Guided by honesty, stewardship, and a commitment to long-term partnerships.
Home.vp5Title: A network that reaches across Africa
Home.vp5Body: Through the Daron Group network, we serve ports and industries across the continent.
Home.proofHeading: Proven at scale. Trusted in critical operations.
Home.proofBody1: Daron Namibia has supported multiple offshore drilling campaigns simultaneously — delivering provisions and technical supply to rigs operating under pressure.
Home.proofBody2: From supplying the Deepsea Mira, Deepsea Bollsta, and Deepsea Hercules at the same time, to our early work on the Transocean Marianas in 2013, our track record reflects one thing:
Home.proofPunchline: When operations are critical, we deliver.
Home.proofAsideTitle: Operational capability you can rely on
Home.proofAsideBullet3: Track record dating back to 2013 offshore campaigns
Home.proofAsideBullet4: Trusted during vessel repairs and active drilling phases
Home.innovHeading: Meet Don — Daron's AI operations copilot.
Home.innovBody: Don handles RFQs, generates quotes, and keeps our team connected 24/7. Powered by Anthropic's Claude, integrated with our product catalog, and available on WhatsApp. Fast, accurate, and always on — reviewed and approved by a Daron specialist before every quote ships.
Home.svcHeading: Explore how we keep operations moving
Home.rfqHeading: Tight deadline? We've reactivated rigs in 11 days.
Home.rfqBody: When the cargo is moving and your supplier needs to keep up, the Daron AI assistant drafts your quote on WhatsApp in minutes. A KAM reviews every request before it ships.
Home.containerAlt: A navy Daron Namibia branded shipping container being lowered by a crane
Home.opsHeading: Real work. Real partners. Real scale.
Home.opsIntro: Not stock photography. Not renderings. Real operations from Walvis Bay.
Home.ops1Alt: Container being lifted onto Subsea7 vessel at Walvis Bay
Home.ops2Alt: Seven Borealis pipelay vessel docked at Walvis Bay at dusk
Home.ops3Alt: Daron truck delivering to the Normand Energy rig
Home.ops4Alt: Daron operations at Walvis Bay quayside
Home.ops5Alt: Daron truck delivering provisions to a cruise ship
Home.ops6Alt: Daron truck fleet operating at night

About.heroTitle: From ship chandler to full-service partner
About.heroIntro: Daron Namibia was founded in {founded} with a clear vision: to deliver world-class supply chain services from right here in Namibia.
About.storyHeading: Built in Walvis Bay. Backed by the Daron Group.
About.storyP1: Daron Namibia was founded in {founded} as the Namibian presence of the Daron Group — a family-owned marine support business that has been operating across Africa since 1959. The Group runs technical supply, provisions, food services, logistics and engineering operations through entities in Namibia, South Africa, Angola, Senegal, Mozambique, Congo and Côte d'Ivoire, with around 350 staff across the network.
About.storyP2: Starting as a ship chandler in Walvis Bay, we've expanded into catering, warehousing, logistics, health & safety, and dry-dock technical support — always guided by our promise of quality, service, and excellence. From humble beginnings, we've grown into a trusted partner for shipowners, offshore operators, hospitality groups and industrial clients across Africa.
About.missionBody: To consistently deliver reliable, client-focused marine and technical solutions, ensuring operational excellence and outstanding service at every step.
About.visionBody: To be Africa's leading ship chandler and provider of marine, engineering, and technical goods & services across industries.
About.value1: We deliver the highest quality standards in every product and service.
About.value2: We put the client first, every time.
About.value3: We aim for the best in all we do.
About.value4: We meet our commitments and go the extra mile to get the job done.
About.innovHeading: Meet Don — Daron's AI operations copilot
About.innovP1: At Daron Namibia, we've built Don — an AI-powered operations copilot that works alongside our ship chandling team to deliver faster, more accurate quotes for vessels calling at Walvis Bay.
About.innovP2: Don reads incoming RFQs in any format (email, Excel, PDF, Word), matches items against our full provisions, bonded, cabin, and technical catalog, applies client-specific pricing, and produces a ready-to-send quote in minutes. Every quote is reviewed and approved by a Daron specialist before it leaves our system — Don accelerates response time without compromising the accuracy and accountability our clients depend on.

Services.heroTitle: Five pillars. One partner. Endless solutions.
Services.heroIntro: Procurement, catering, warehousing, logistics, health & safety, and dry-dock technical support — managed in-house by people who know your operation.
Services.p1Blurb: Our chandlery services keep vessels and offshore rigs fully operational, no matter the need.
Services.p1Provide1: Deck stores, safety & survival equipment, engine parts
Services.p1Provide4: Exclusive distributor for Orlichem and Hempel
Services.p1Why2: ISSA / IMPA listed for international compatibility
Services.p1Why3: Reliable local and global sourcing backed by trusted relationships
Services.p2Title: Fueling crews & clients with fresh, balanced meals
Services.p2Blurb: From offshore rigs to hospitality groups, we design and deliver catering solutions that balance nutrition, cost-efficiency, and taste.
Services.p2Provide1: Fresh produce, dry goods, vacuum-packed meats
Services.p2Provide2: Menus designed with dietitians for balanced nutrition
Services.p2Provide3: Emergency stock control to ensure consistency
Services.p3Blurb: Our warehousing and logistics infrastructure ensures smooth operations from storage to delivery.
Services.p3Provide1: Refrigerated, freezer, dry and bonded storage
Services.p3Provide3: Visas, crew changes, and travel arrangements
Services.p3Why2: Optimized workflows that reduce delays and risks
Services.p3Why3: Logistics managed through trusted exclusive partners
Services.p4Title: Protecting crews and sites with trusted safety equipment
Services.p4Blurb: Industrial health and safety supply, backed by global technology leaders trusted across oil & gas, marine and mining operations.
Services.p4Provide1: Gas detection — portable and fixed (Honeywell BW, Blackline G7)
Services.p4Provide2: Connected safety and lone-worker monitoring (Blackline Safety)
Services.p4Provide3: PPE, respiratory protection and escape sets
Services.p4Why1: Authorized distributor for Honeywell and Blackline Safety
Services.p4Why2: Equipment certified for harsh offshore and industrial environments
Services.p4Why3: On-site calibration and servicing via trained technicians
Services.p4Why4: Aligned with our ISO 9001 quality controls
Services.p5Title: Technical dry-dock support for vessels in Walvis Bay
Services.p5Blurb: Daron Namibia supports vessels at berth, afloat, and during dry dock — marine repairs, technical procurement, vessel provisions, and supply-chain coordination. Full technical team covering mechanical, electrical, structural fabrication, safety & compliance, and ship chandling.
Services.p5Provide2: Hull inspection & repairs; steel and aluminium fabrication
Services.p5Provide4: Safety & compliance — fire systems, CO₂, gas detection, life rafts
Services.p5Why1: Multidisciplinary marine expertise — in-house technical team
Services.p5Why4: Reliable project delivery — case studies on the full page
Services.p5Why5: Part of the Daron Group — 1959, 8 countries, 350+ staff
Services.p5Cta: See full dry-dock scope & case studies

DryDock.heroTitle: Technical dry-dock support for vessels in Walvis Bay
DryDock.heroIntro: Daron Namibia supports vessels at berth, afloat, and during dry dock — marine repairs, technical procurement, vessel provisions, and supply-chain coordination from a family-owned Namibian business inside the wider Daron Group.
DryDock.opsHeading: Supporting vessels at berth, afloat, and during dry dock
DryDock.op1Body: Hull, mechanical, electrical, and structural repair work at berth, afloat, or during dry dock.
DryDock.op2Body: Fast sourcing of spares, parts, tools, and consumables — local and global network of 2,500+ suppliers.
DryDock.op3Body: Deck and engine stores, provisions, consumables, bonded stores — ISSA & IMPA listed.
DryDock.op4Body: Freight, customs, permits, kitting, milestone-based delivery, and dockside staging.
DryDock.supportHeading: Typical scope during a dry docking
DryDock.caseHeading: Real work, delivered by the Daron technical team
DryDock.case1Body: Before-and-after of specialised chemical cleaning on a working deck. Demonstrates the Orlichem chemical offer integrated into our dock scope.
DryDock.case1Alt: Before and after photos of deck cleaning using Orlichem marine chemicals
DryDock.case2Body: Severe rust and marine fouling on a vessel bow, prepped and coated using Hempel marine systems. Daron is an official Hempel Group distributor.
DryDock.case2Alt: Before and after photos of vessel bow refurbishment using Hempel coatings
DryDock.case3Body: Completed ahead of schedule — fire safety system new install, mechanical & electrical repairs, navigation equipment repairs, fabrication & structural work, technical supplies and provisions.
DryDock.case3Alt: SL Africa vessel project summary of works completed
DryDock.case4Body: Motor overhauls, compressor repairs, and mechanical maintenance on deck equipment — real work delivered by the Daron technical team.
DryDock.case4Alt: Before and after of winch mechanical refurbishment on a vessel
DryDock.whyHeading: A trusted partner for vessel readiness
DryDock.rfqHeading: Send your docking schedule or scope of work.
DryDock.rfqBody: The Daron AI assistant drafts a response on WhatsApp within minutes. A technical KAM reviews every scope before it ships.

Industries.heroIntro: From chandlery to catering, warehousing to logistics — we manage it all across four sectors that shape Africa's economies.
Industries.marineBody: Tailored chandlery, catering, and technical supplies and services that keep vessels and rigs operating smoothly — from routine resupply to fast-turnaround reactivations.
Industries.marineAlt: Worker loading supplies onto a vessel at Walvis Bay harbour
Industries.oilGasBody: Trusted to supply multiple offshore rigs simultaneously under active drilling conditions — from the Deepsea Mira, Bollsta and Hercules to the Transocean Marianas (2013).
Industries.oilGasAlt: Offshore oil and gas platform operations
Industries.oilGasCta: See our offshore drilling track record
Industries.hospPromise: Supplying quality that guests can taste.
Industries.hospBody: Reliable delivery of fresh produce and catering support for hotels and resorts. We bring the same supply chain discipline our marine clients rely on to your front of house.
Industries.hospAlt: Daron food supply worker preparing fresh produce
Industries.miningBody: Technical supplies, warehousing, and logistics designed for demanding environments — bonded storage, branded fleet, and the workflow to keep production lines moving.
Industries.miningAlt: Industrial and mining supply operations in Namibia
Industries.rfqHeading: Talk to us about your industry needs.
Industries.rfqBody: One partner. Endless solutions. From chandlery to catering, warehousing to logistics — we manage it all.

OilGas.heroIntro: Trusted to supply multiple offshore rigs simultaneously under active drilling conditions. Our offshore track record runs from the Transocean Marianas (2013) to the Deepsea Mira, Deepsea Bollsta, and Deepsea Hercules — all supplied at the same time, under real operational pressure.
OilGas.talkToTeam: Talk to our oil & gas team
OilGas.rigsHeading: Multiple offshore campaigns. One supply partner.
OilGas.rigsBody: Daron Namibia has successfully supported multiple offshore rigs during active drilling operations — supplied simultaneously, under real operational pressure.
OilGas.rig1Note: Semi-submersible drilling rig — active offshore campaign
OilGas.rig4Note: Semi-submersible — our first major offshore engagement (2013)
OilGas.quote: Trusted to supply multiple offshore rigs simultaneously under active drilling conditions.
OilGas.supplyHeading: Full-service offshore supply from Walvis Bay
OilGas.supply1Body: Fresh produce, dry goods, butchery, bonded stores, and dietitian-designed menus — staged, kitted, and delivered to rig on schedule.
OilGas.supply2Body: Spares, tools, consumables, and critical-path items sourced locally and through our 2,500+ supplier network across Africa and Europe.
OilGas.supply3Body: Exclusive distribution of Orlichem specialised marine chemicals and Hempel marine coatings — integrated into rig maintenance and dry-dock scopes.
OilGas.supply4Body: Customs clearance, freight forwarding, permits, branded fleet, and dockside staging — the handoff to the rig is our problem, not yours.
OilGas.whyHeading: Three things oil & gas operators ask for
OilGas.whyScaleBody: Handling multiple rigs at once means our workflow, inventory, and team are sized for real campaign load — not a single one-off.
OilGas.whyPressureBody: Active drilling is demurrage territory. Slow procurement is a P&L event. Our supply posture is built around the pace offshore operations demand.
OilGas.whyTrackBody: Our first offshore engagement was in 2013. We've been learning rig supply for over a decade — the lessons are baked into how we operate today.
OilGas.rfqBody: Send us your rig roster and provisioning schedule. The Daron AI assistant drafts a response on WhatsApp within minutes — a technical KAM reviews every scope before it ships.

WhyDaron.heroTitle: Six reasons procurement teams across Africa pick us first
WhyDaron.heroIntro: Speed, depth, accountability, partnerships, certifications — and an AI quoting desk that answers in minutes. The full picture below.
WhyDaron.r1Body: Demurrage on a single offshore rig can run upwards of US$50,000 per day. Slow procurement is not a paperwork issue — it is a P&L event. Our AI-powered quoting desk (Daron AI assistant) drafts an RFQ response within minutes on WhatsApp, with a human KAM reviewing every quote before it ships.
WhyDaron.r2Title: If we don't have it, we know who does.
WhyDaron.r2Body: Refrigerated, freezer, dry and bonded storage on-site, plus a network of 2,500+ suppliers across Africa and Europe. When a part isn't in Namibia, we have manufactured replacements on-site to keep an 11-day rig reactivation deadline.
WhyDaron.r3Title: Vessels don't wait. Neither do we.
WhyDaron.r3Body: Offshore operations run around the clock and our delivery posture matches that. Supplies have been delivered to a rig within an hour of being requested. We staff for it, equip for it, and run the workflow so customers can rely on it.
WhyDaron.r4Title: Decisions are made by the people you call.
WhyDaron.r4Body: We are a Namibian family business, not a satellite office of a multinational. The MD answers the phone. Decisions are quick because the chain of command is short. When something goes wrong, you talk to the people who can fix it — not a regional liaison three time zones away.
WhyDaron.r5Body: Our exclusive distribution agreements with Orlichem (specialised marine chemicals) and Hempel (marine coatings) anchor our chandlery offer. Our ongoing collaboration with Pelligrini on offshore projects — most recently the Saipem Santorini — speaks to the operating tempo international partners can expect from us.
WhyDaron.r6Body: International credibility is not a marketing claim — it's a checklist that gets audited. We are certified to the standards your procurement team will ask about, and our processes are built around them.
WhyDaron.stat1Label: Sapura Berani full rig reactivation, with Pelligrini
WhyDaron.stat2Label: Suppliers across Africa and Europe in our network
WhyDaron.rfqHeading: See if we're the right fit for your operation.
WhyDaron.rfqBody: Send your RFQ on WhatsApp or message us directly. A KAM will be back to you the same day.

Insights.heroIntro: Articles and updates designed to keep you informed — operating reality, market shifts, and the partnerships behind the work.
Insights.talkCta: Talk to Daron AI assistant about your project

AI.heroTitle: Meet Don — Daron's AI operations copilot
AI.heroIntro: Daron Namibia is the first ship chandler in Walvis Bay to deploy a dedicated AI operations copilot. Don handles RFQs, generates quotes, and keeps our team connected 24/7 — powered by Anthropic's Claude, integrated with our product catalog, and available on WhatsApp.
AI.enterpriseHeading: An always-on AI colleague — not a chatbot.
AI.enterpriseP1: Don is powered by Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.7, one of the most capable language models available. He runs on the OpenClaw agent platform and integrates directly with our product catalog, pricing engine, and client database inside Supabase.
AI.enterpriseP2: When an RFQ lands — whether that's an email from a key account, an Excel spreadsheet from a vessel in port, or a voice note on WhatsApp — Don reads it, matches every line against our live catalog, applies the right client pricing tier, and drafts a ready-to-send quote inside minutes.
AI.enterpriseP3: A Daron specialist reviews and approves every quote before it leaves our system. Don accelerates response time; he does not replace the trust, judgment, and accountability our clients rely on.
AI.capHeading: RFQ to ready-to-send quote, in minutes
AI.cap1Body: Excel (.xlsx, .xls), PDF, and Word (.docx). Don extracts product, quantity, and unit from structured documents and text.
AI.cap2Body: Provisions, bonded stores, cabin supplies, butchery, technical items — fuzzy matching across descriptions, live from Supabase.
AI.cap3Body: Tier-based pricing with live FX conversion (NAD → USD / EUR / ZAR). No guessing, no invented SKUs — only verified catalog data.
AI.cap4Body: Rather than guess, Don surfaces ambiguous items so a human reviewer can confirm or correct before the quote goes out.
AI.cap5Body: Ready-to-send Excel output matching our existing client templates — direct client delivery once a human signs off.
AI.cap6Body: Recognizes 51 Daron Namibia team members by name and role, and client templates by email domain (MCTC, HMS Hamburg, D2S, Oceanic, Bourbon).
AI.human1Body: No quote leaves Daron's system without a specialist review and sign-off.
AI.human2Body: Ambiguous matches are surfaced, not guessed at. The human makes the call.
AI.human3Body: No invented SKUs, no invented prices — only what's in our live catalog and pricing engine.
AI.techNote: Running on the Claude Max enterprise subscription — no per-token costs, highest reasoning capability available.
AI.rfqBody: Drop a spreadsheet, a PDF, or a voice note on WhatsApp. Don reads it, matches every line against our catalog, and drafts a quote inside minutes — a Daron specialist reviews every quote before it ships.

Contact.heroIntro: Looking for a trusted partner to simplify your supply chain? Get in touch with our team today.
Contact.card1Body: The Daron AI assistant is our AI quoting agent, live on WhatsApp. Drafted quotes back in minutes.
Contact.card2Body: For order coordination, deliveries, and account questions.
Contact.card3Body: For specifications, sourcing, and technical sales support.
Contact.hoursOffshore: Offshore RFQs handled outside hours via WhatsApp
Contact.facebookLink: Walvis Bay Ship Chandlers on Facebook
Contact.formIntro: We'll route your enquiry to the right team and reply within one business day. For instant quotes, the Daron AI assistant on WhatsApp is faster.
